channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: docusealco /docuseal | Ruby | N/A
item.description: Open source DocuSign alternative. Create, fill, and sign digital documents ✍️

item.title: cocoindex-io /cocoindex | Python | N/A
item.description: Incremental engine for long horizon agents 🌟 Star if you like it!

item.title: jellyfin /jellyfin | C# | N/A
item.description: The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API

item.title: fspecii /ace-step-ui | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: 🎵 The Ultimate Open Source Suno Alternative - Professional UI for ACE-Step 1.5 AI Music Generation. Free, local, unlimited. Stop paying for Suno!

item.title: virattt /dexter | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: An autonomous agent for deep financial research

item.title: msitarzewski /agency-agents | Shell | N/A
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: czlonkowski /n8n-mcp | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A MCP for Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Windsurf / Cursor to build n8n workflows for you

item.title: soxoj /maigret | Python | N/A
item.description: 🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites

item.description: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal

item.title: browserbase /skills | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Claude Agent SDK with a web browsing tool

item.title: TauricResearch /TradingAgents | Python | N/A
item.description: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

item.title: ruvnet /ruflo | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration
